records.question: What stadium named Invesco Field at Mile High has at least 8 home games, an average attendance of at least 74908, a capacity percentage exactly 98.4, and a total attendance of at most 599264?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.average_attendance >= 74908.0 AND stadium.capacity_percentage = 98.4 AND stadium.name = 'Invesco Field at Mile High' AND stadium.total_attendance <= 599264.0 AND stadium.home_games >= 8
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM stadium WHERE name = 'Invesco Field at Mile High' AND Home_Games >= 8 AND Average_Attendance >= 74908 AND Capacity_Percentage = 98.4 AND Total_Attendance <= 599264

records.question: Which stadium named Cowboys Stadium has a total attendance of exactly 696377, an average attendance of at least 87047, no more than 8 home games, and a capacity percentage exactly equal to 108.8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.average_attendance >= 87047.0 AND stadium.home_games <= 8 AND stadium.total_attendance = 696377.0 AND stadium.capacity_percentage = 108.8 AND stadium.name = 'Cowboys Stadium'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT id
FROM stadium
WHERE name = 'Cowboys Stadium'
  AND Total_Attendance = 696377
  AND Average_Attendance >= 87047
  AND Home_Games <= 8
  AND Capacity_Percentage = 108.8

records.question: Which stadiums have a total attendance of exactly 553152.0 and hosted games in seasons at most 2012?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE game.season <= 2012 AND stadium.total_attendance = 553152.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM stadium s
JOIN game g ON s.id = g.stadium_id
WHERE s.Total_Attendance = 553152.0 AND g.Season <= 2012

records.question: What stadiums have a total attendance of at most 569817 and an average attendance of no more than 71227, where a game with an away team of Pakhtakor ended with a score of 1–2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.total_attendance <= 569817.0 AND game.score = '1–2' AND game.away_team = 'Pakhtakor' AND stadium.average_attendance <= 71227.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM stadium s
JOIN game g ON s.id = g.stadium_id
WHERE s.Total_Attendance <= 569817
AND s.Average_Attendance <= 71227
AND g.Away_team = 'Pakhtakor'
AND g.Score = '1–2'

records.gold_sql:

JOIN game g ON s.id = g.stadium_id

records.question: What stadium named M&T Bank Stadium has an average attendance of at least 71227, hosts at least 8 home games, and held a game on 12 July 2009 where Bunyodkor was the home team and Pakhtakor the away team in season 2009 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE game.away_team = 'Pakhtakor' AND stadium.name = 'M&T Bank Stadium' AND stadium.home_games >= 8 AND game.home_team = 'Bunyodkor' AND game.date = '12 July 2009' AND game.season <= 2009 AND stadium.average_attendance >= 71227.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM stadium s
JOIN game g ON s.id = g.stadium_id
WHERE s.name = 'M&T Bank Stadium'
AND s.Average_Attendance >= 71227
AND s.Home_Games >= 8
AND g.Date = '12 July 2009'
AND g.Home_team = 'Bunyodkor'
AND g.Away_team = 'Pakhtakor'
AND g.Season <= 2009
